key_files.relevance: Dart download metadata pattern to follow for Flutter
Alpine Dart role — needs Flutter tasks added
Ubuntu Dart role — needs Flutter tasks added
Alpine-specific Dart role — needs Flutter tasks added
Dart label needs updating to mention Flutter
Dart role included when dart selected; dart_version var passed
Test for dart label and versions

patterns.name: download-metadata
patterns.description: Downloads defined in downloads.yml, loaded in roles via 'downloads' variable, accessed as downloads.<lang>.versions[<ver>].url

patterns.name: role-tasks
patterns.description: Ansible tasks: install deps, set_fact for download metadata, get_url, unarchive, copy profile.d env script, symlink, cleanup, verify

patterns.name: distro-variants
patterns.description: Each language has generic (alpine), -ubuntu, and -alpine role variants. Generic role == alpine role content.

similar_features.notes: Flutter follows same pattern: download zip/tar, extract to /usr/local/flutter, update PATH in profile.d

architecture.role_selection: Provisioner selects dart role when config.dart is set; appends to roles list
architecture.version_passing: dart_version variable passed to playbook vars; role uses it to index downloads.dart.versions

extension_points: Add 'flutter' section to downloads.yml with same version key structure as dart
Add Flutter tasks at end of dart role task files

testing.pattern: Unit tests for provisioner logic; role YAML files tested implicitly via provisioner

conventions: Role tasks: install system deps → set_fact for download → download → extract → configure PATH → symlink → cleanup → verify
Downloads use get_url with checksum where possible
